name: Guys Transform
description: Guys Transform is a free online running game for boys played on PuzzleGame! Change your character with simple clicks on the buttons. Keep an eye out! There are various obstacles to overcome, you will have to choose the right transformation, otherwise, you will be left behind. One-tap easy-to-learn controls with stunning visual effects and addictive gameplay mechanics! Have a great time!
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle, running, Skill
